title: lasianthus constrictus
intro: Lasianthus constrictus, also known as the Constrict Lasianthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Lasianthus constrictus are typically made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
